signals.headline: Fed Chair Powell Confirms Tariffs Driving Goods Inflation as One-Time Effect, Expects Peak in Q1 2026; Describes Economy
signals.raw:
Fed Chair Powell Confirms Tariffs Driving Goods Inflation as One-Time Effect, Expects Peak in Q1 2026; Describes Economy as 'Very Unusual' Amid Weakening Labor Market** | YES | HIGH

Powell stated in recent remarks that most goods price overshoots stem from tariffs, viewing them as a one-time increase rather than persistent inflation, with core PCE inflation slightly above 2% excluding tariff effe
matched_markets: Will Powell say "Tariff inflation" during April press conference?

signals.headline: Lakers and Cavaliers Both Win NBA Playoff Game 1 (April 19, 2026)** | YES | MED confidence
signals.raw:
Lakers and Cavaliers Both Win NBA Playoff Game 1 (April 19, 2026)** | YES | MED confidence

Lakers defeated Houston Rockets in Game 1, with LeBron James leading and Quentin Grimes (noted as Kennard in recap, likely error) scoring 27 points including five 3s, though Rockets remain series favorites at ~70% implied probability on DraftKings[1][2]. Cavaliers beat Raptors in Game 1 using a new defensiv
matched_markets: Will Cooper Flagg win the 2025–26 NBA Rookie of the Year award?
NBA Playoffs: Who Will Win Series? - Raptors vs. Cavaliers

signals.headline: **Use Polymarket's XTracker tool**[5] to analyze social media metrics that could inform trader sentiment
signals.raw:
**Use Polymarket's XTracker tool**[5] to analyze social media metrics that could inform trader sentiment

The search results indicate that Polymarket markets update continuously as new information emerges[1], but they don't provide the live, moment-to-moment data needed to identify current whale bets, trending discussion topics, or just-announced events that would move markets right now.

signals.headline: I cannot provide the real-time information you're requesting
signals.raw:
I cannot provide the real-time information you're requesting. The search results provided describe Polymarket's platform and show historical market snapshots from April 2026, but they don't contain current social media discussions, live whale trading activity, or breaking news announcements that would be necessary to answer your query.

To find this information, you would need to:

signals.headline: **Monitor Polymarket directly** in real-time at polymarket
signals.raw: **Monitor Polymarket directly** in real-time at polymarket.com to see current market prices and trading volume across active markets[1][2][4]

signals.headline: **Track social media platforms** where traders discuss prediction markets (X, Discord, Reddit prediction market communit
signals.raw: **Track social media platforms** where traders discuss prediction markets (X, Discord, Reddit prediction market communities) for live commentary on market movements
